scope: TerrAI multi-scale spatial intelligence open-data pipeline

sources.source_updated_at_note: The combined upstream products do not publish one shared update timestamp.
sources.license: GSI content terms; Survey Act procedure may apply to some uses
sources.rights_limit: Attribution and edited-data notice required; inspect third-party rights per tile layer

sources.source_updated_at_note: Dataset years are temporal coverage, not publication timestamps.
sources.format: 64-band Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF via byte-range reads
sources.access_cost: free public COG mirror; no Earth Engine account
sources.scoring_limit: Independent evidence only; excluded from decision scores until local validation

sources.source_updated_at_note: OSM is continuously edited; the source exposes no single global update timestamp.
sources.format: OSM vector extracts converted to GeoJSON
sources.rights_limit: Attribution required; public derivative databases may trigger share-alike; completeness is not guaranteed

sources.spatial_limit: Facility identity/location is official; roof, PV and service-area fields are PoC proxies

sources.license: GSI content terms / Public Data License 1.0 unless otherwise stated
sources.access_cost: free direct public download; no account or API key
sources.source_policy: National base; Yokohama City data is retained for validation and explicit local supplements.
sources.spatial_limit: Designation and hazard applicability must be confirmed with the municipality before emergency use.

sources.source_updated_at_note: The cached product is a 2001–2020 climatology; it is not a dated observation release.
sources.license: NASA open data policy; attribution recommended; no endorsement
sources.spatial_limit: Long-term climate background, not site-level energy yield

sources.license: not an open-data license; official notice marks redistribution prohibited
sources.local_cache: data/external/tepco/ (Git-ignored ZIP, CSV and retrieval metadata)
sources.spatial_limit: No complete equipment geometry for parcel-level allocation; values do not guarantee connection
sources.rights_limit: Internal screening only until redistribution/commercial rights are confirmed with TEPCO

sources.spatial_limit: 2020 and 2021 products use different algorithm versions; change is not purely observed land-cover change

sources.access_cost: free data; Data Space account and quotas may apply
sources.spatial_limit: Cloud masking, seasonal compositing and quality metadata required; 10 m is not roof-structure resolution

sources.access_cost: free for layers marked open data
sources.license: layer-specific; commercial use permitted only where portal marks open data
sources.spatial_limit: Authority, vintage, scale and legal status must be retained per layer

sources.license: MAFF field polygon terms; attribution and edit notice
sources.spatial_limit: Field polygons support agricultural-use screening but are not ownership records

sources.access_cost: free after G-Spatial Information Center login
sources.license: Legal Affairs Bureau map data terms
sources.spatial_limit: Open parcel map does not provide a complete open owner list

sources.access_cost: free API; application and API key required
sources.license: MLIT Real Estate Information Library API terms
sources.spatial_limit: Required disclaimer; reference information only, not guaranteed for statutory procedures

sources.license: dataset-specific; commercial-use flag must be checked
sources.spatial_limit: Natural parks, conservation, wildlife protection and forest layers differ in authority and update date

sources.license: website terms must be rechecked before bulk republication
sources.spatial_limit: Not a complete operating-asset inventory; small systems and address fields have publication limits

sources.license: Japanese government statistics terms and attribution
sources.spatial_limit: Statistical boundary, not authoritative cadastral or legal boundary
